description: Cockpit completeness and polish — close the gaps that keep a UI-first user from running their whole dev process in the cockpit without dropping to the terminal. Surfaced by the 2026-06-07 E2E UX sweep (docs/ui-cli-parity.md baseline). Sibling to COMP-PARITY (which covers CLI↔UI capability parity); COMP-COCKPIT covers in-cockpit action feedback, observability, onboarding, and correctness. Umbrella for COMP-COCKPIT-1 through COMP-COCKPIT-6.
